subparts.text: Define Adiabatic efficiency of a reciprocating air compressor. Write its expression and give the description of each notation appearing in the expression.
Define isentropic efficiency of a centrifugal air compressor with the help of T-s diagram. Write its expression and give the description of each notation appearing in the expression.

In what type of multi cylinder engine, there are three sets of opposed piston type of cylinder blocks? Draw the schematic diagram of that engine and briefly explain its constructional features and power production process.
Define Octane Number rating of SI engine fuels. Give the chemical name and structural formula of the fuel which is assigned an Octane Number of 100.
Give the names of two substances that are extensively used as working fluid in a closed cycle gas turbine?
Draw a single T-s diagram for an open cycle gas turbine plant showing inter-cooling, regeneration and reheating simultaneously.
Differentiate between jet propulsion and rocket propulsion.
Define sonic velocity in a medium and write the expression for sonic velocity in a perfect gas describing each notation appearing in the expression.

questions.question_text: Define volumetric efficiency of a single stage reciprocating air compressor with clearance and derive the following expression for the volumetric efficiency: пғә пғә пғә пғ» пғ№ пғӘ пғӘ пғӘ пғ« пғ© пҖӯ пғ·пғ· пғё пғ¶ пғ§пғ§ пғЁ пғҰ пҖӯ пҖҪ 1 1 1 1 2 n vol p p K пҒЁ Where, K is the clearance ratio of the compressor. Apart from the pressure ratio, clearance and index of compression, on what other factors does the volumetric efficiency of the compressor depend? Explain the effects of all such factors on volumetric efficiency.

Air is sucked in by a centrifugal compressor at the volumetric flow rate of 5 m3/s. Inlet pressure and temperature are 1 bar and 300 K. Air is compressed by the compressor polytropically with polytropic index, n = 1.45 through a pressure ratio of 1.5:1. The mean diameters of the eye and impeller tip are 30 cm and 60 cm respectively, and the flow velocity of air at inlet and outlet is the same and equal to 67 m/s. The compressor runs at 8500 rpm. There is no diffuser and the whole pressure rise takes place in the impeller and the casing. The blades have negligible thickness. Calculate: Blade angles at inlet and outlet of the impeller Absolute angles at the tip of the impeller Breadths of the blade at inlet and outlet of the impeller.
Explain the effects of following factors on the detonation tendency of an SI engine giving proper reasons: Supercharging Engine speed Cylinder size Molecular structure of fuel
Draw a neat sketch of battery ignition system for an SI Engine and explain the function of each component of the system.

Draw the T-s diagram for a Brayton cycle and derive the expressions for optimum pressure ratio for maximum cycle efficiency and optimum pressure ratio for maximum specific work output in terms of compressor inlet and turbine inlet temperatures and prove that the pressure ratio for maximum specific work output is the square root of the pressure ratio for maximum cycle efficiency. Clearly describe each notation used in the derivations.

In an open cycle gas turbine plant, air enters the compressor at 1 bar and 30oC. The pressure ratio is 4:1. The isentropic efficiencies of the compressor and turbine are 80% and 85% respectively. The maximum cycle temperature is 800oC. Calculate the net power developed in kW and thermal efficiency of the cycle if the flow rate of air is 2.5 kg/s. Take Cp = 1.005 kJ /kg-K and Оі = 1.4 and neglect the mass of fuel.
With the help of neat sketches explain the working of Ramjet Engine and Liquid Propellant Rocket Engine.

A fighter aircraft is flying at an altitude of 15 km where the values of atmospheric pressure and temperature are 18821 Pa and - 60oC respectively. The Mach angle of the flight is 30o. Use drawing instruments, assume suitable scale and draw the Mach cone showing the wave fronts at 1, 2 and 3 seconds prior to the current position of the aircraft. Mark the Mach angle in the Mach cone and show different zones. Calculate the value of the stagnation temperature of the air after it is rammed due to the motion of the aircraft. Calculate the value of the stagnation pressure of the air after it is rammed due to the motion of the aircraft. For air, R = 287 J/kg-K and П’ = 1.4.
